name: data-pipeline
description: Extract, validate, transform, load, and verify a dataset.

steps.instruction: Pull the raw data from {source}. List the tables/collections found.
steps.title: Extract

steps.instruction: Check the raw data is shaped as expected before doing any work on it.
steps.title: Validate Raw

steps.instruction: Clean {table}: dedupe, fix types, normalize nulls.
steps.title: Clean

steps.instruction: Confirm the load: counts match, no nulls in required columns, spot-checks pass.
steps.title: Verify
